title: thuja decurrens
intro: Thuja decurrens, also known as Western red cedar, is a coniferous tree native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Thuja decurrens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and even help to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of Thuja decurrens include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
